faq.question: First : DSSSB Result PDF Method
faq.answer: In many cases, DSSSB releases the result in PDF format. Candidates need to download the PDF and search their roll number using the Ctrl + F option. If the roll number is found in the list, the candidate is considered qualified.

faq.question: Second : DSSSB Online Portal Login Method
faq.answer: Some results are available through the DSSSB online portal where candidates can check their scorecard, marks, and detailed result.
